---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: feature
assignees: dmz006
---

**Surface(s) affected:** phone / wear / auto / shared-kmp / ios-skel / multiple

**What you want to do:**
A clear description of the capability.

**Why:**
Who benefits and what problem does this solve?

**Suggested design (optional):**
If you have a concrete proposal, sketch it here. Remember that architectural decisions
need an ADR (`docs/decisions/`) — see [AGENT.md](../AGENT.md) "Decision Making".

**Parity with datawatch server?**
Does this need a change in [dmz006/datawatch](https://github.com/dmz006/datawatch)? If so,
link or propose the upstream ticket.

**Alternatives considered:**
What else did you think about? Why isn't it the right fit?
